title: Echoes of the Void
description: A dimension-spanning expansion mod that adds a chilling new layer of depth to Minecraft's worldgen and combat.
body:
Echoes of the Void is a dimension-spanning expansion mod that adds a chilling new layer of depth to Minecraft's worldgen and combat. Explore mysterious ancient structures hidden across the Overworld, Nether, and End, each guarded by powerful new Void-touched mobs with unique abilities and loot.

Wield locator artifacts to uncover rare structures, battle new tough mobs, get rare loot items. Echoes of the Void blends seamlessly into vanilla gameplay, rewarding explorers who dig deeper and dare to uncover the hidden chaos beneath the familiar.

- 6 custom mobs with advanced AI and effects
- 3 unique structure types across all dimensions
- Locator items to help you find hidden echoes
- Rare loot, surprise mechanics, and immersive vibes

**THIS MOD REQUIRES FABRIC API TO FUNCTION, PLEASE INSTALL IT!**
